meta.homeDescription: Taxi Joker — reliable taxi service in Slavonski Brod. City and intercity transport, transfers, courier services and shopping. Call 091 3330 308.

hero.tagline: Order any type of transport, all in one place.

items.title: Courier Services
items.text: Need a parcel delivered? Give us a call and we'll take care of it.

items.title: Shopping
items.text: Need groceries or don't want to drive late at night? We'll shop and deliver whatever you need.

items.title: Always On Time
items.text: Our taxis are always there at the agreed time. In exceptional cases, your driver will let you know the exact arrival time.

pricing.heading: Pricing
pricing.disclaimer: Travel outside Slavonski Brod and transport of large items (fridge, TV, etc.) is charged at a pre-agreed price. The meter starts upon the vehicle's arrival at your address.
